task_objective: Exports previously serialized only the truncated preview DataFrame (capped by the Preview Size slider). Allow downloading the full result set.
design_decisions: Engines accept limit=None to mean 'no row cap' (full result set, is_truncated=False); the integer preview path is unchanged.
app.py records the engine-dialect query (query_to_run) and engine name at submit time so a full export re-runs the exact query without re-translating.

Full export is opt-in via a 'Prepare full export' button (only shown when the preview is truncated), since an unbounded re-run can be expensive, especially on Spark. The result bytes are cached in session_state.full_export.
Extracted encode_export() and export_base_name() helpers to avoid duplicating the format->bytes mapping between the preview and full-export download buttons.
results: ruff check/format clean, ty check clean, 55 passed / 1 skipped via ./run.sh uv run pytest. README updated.
